title: GuidebookAPI
description: Allow the ease creation of guides for minecraft mods with no hard-dependency.
body:
## GuidebookAPI is currently under a rewrite!

![Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6936103301f5561334be80d3032a547799f1cc3b.png)

GuidebookApi is a mod that allow the ease creation of guides with no hard dependency.

Some of the features of this mod are:
  - **Modify the guides has you want! You can change what guides spawn, if you want all the guides to spawn or the color of these!**

  - **Add or change content based on the configuration or assets of the mod.**

  - **Add custom page types, like recipes or any type of page do you need/want!**

  - **All the guides are made mostly in java-code instead of external files like other mods!**

**All this with no-hard dependency, this means the mods with a guide can work without the mod installed!**

![Credits](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2fa80f22010ae37a9a0cc7659de2512829e05c3d.png)

  - **Original Mod: TehNut and Tombenpotter.**
  - **This mod: WonejoMB/Leo**

![Extras](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34a0f68689f3f83932365881854ccc9f88051b0a.png)

GuidebookApi started ( and is ) a fork of the [GuideAPI][guideapiurl] mod made by TehNut and Tombenpotter.

Currently the mod has some changes to the mod's internal API, but some of the code base is still there so if you are a developer you can see the [ExampleBook][examplebookurl] on github or you can see the [Developer Wiki of the original mod][guideapideveloperinfo]. ( Preferred see both because there are some features of the original mod removed or replaced with others )

There are other versions of GuidebookAPI but aren't here ( because of problems with the account here ) so the older versions of [GuidebookAPI are on curseforge][curseforgeurl]!.

**This mod is under the [MIT license.][license]**

[guideapiurl]:https://modrinth.com/mod/guide-api-legacy
[examplebookurl]:https://github.com/wonejomb/GuidebookAPI/blob/1.20.x-3.0.0/Common/src/main/java/de/wonejo/gapi/example/ExampleBook.java
[guideapideveloperinfo]:https://guide-api.readthedocs.io/en/latest/
[curseforgeurl]:https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/guidebookapi
[license]:https://github.com/wonejomb/GuidebookAPI/blob/1.20.x-3.0.0/LICENSE.MD
